## Proposed Changes

- [ ] Clear description of the problem being solved
- [ ] List of modified components or features

## Compliance Checklist

- [ ] **Tests**: Have you added or updated tests?
- [ ] **Linting**: Did you run `ruff check .` and `ruff format .` locally?
- [ ] **Documentation**: Have you updated the README or docstrings?
- [ ] **Breaking Changes**: Does this change break any existing API?

## Screenshots / Evidence (if applicable)

- *Provide evidence of the fix or feature working.*

## Linked Issues

- Fixes #
